Best strategies for noisy labels: (1) early stopping, (2) sample selection - use small-loss samples (Co-teaching/CleanLab), (3) ensemble. Better: train ConvNeXt-Tiny carefully tuned + use TTA at inference. Or use larger model. Decision: Try a cleaner approach: train ConvNeXt-Tiny with strong augmentation, early stop based on training dynamics. Use ensemble of 2 short runs at different seeds + TTA (horizontal flip averaging). First train one solid model (4 epochs at 224 with mixup+LS, but lower LR, using both train+val data combined since val labels also noisy = more data). Save & submit eval.
